title: pelargonium × agonizans
intro: Pelargonium × agonizans, also known as Rose Geranium, is a hybrid plant species within the Geraniaceae family. It is a perennial herb native to South Africa, valued for its medicinal and fragrant properties. The essential oil extracted from the leaves of Pelargonium × agonizans is known for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties, which can be used to treat various health issues such as digestive problems, stress, and anxiety. Herbal preparations of Pelargonium × agonizans include teas, essential oils, and tinctures, which can be used to promote relaxation, improve sleep, and alleviate symptoms of menopause.
